name: okx-plugin-store
description: Official and community plugins for OKX Plugin Store.

plugins.name: aave-v2-plugin
plugins.description: Aave V2 exit tool across Ethereum, Polygon, and Avalanche - all reserves frozen by governance. Redeem aTokens, repay legacy debt, claim stkAAVE/WMATIC/WAVAX rewards. Use aave-v3-plugin for active supply/borrow.

plugins.name: aave-v3-plugin
plugins.description: Lend and borrow crypto assets on Aave V3 — the leading decentralized liquidity protocol. Trigger phrases: supply to aave, deposit to aave, borrow from aave, repay aave loan, aave health factor, my aave positions, aave interest rates, enable emode, disable collateral, claim aave rewards.

plugins.name: aerodrome-amm-plugin
plugins.description: Swap tokens and provide liquidity on Aerodrome AMM (volatile/stable pools) on Base

plugins.name: aerodrome-slipstream-plugin
plugins.description: Swap tokens and manage concentrated liquidity positions on Aerodrome Slipstream (CLMM) on Base

plugins.name: clanker-plugin
plugins.description: Deploy and manage Clanker ERC-20 tokens on Base and Arbitrum — launch tokens, search by creator, and claim LP fee rewards

plugins.name: clawvard-agent-eval
plugins.description: Take the Clawvard entrance exam, report the result, and optionally save the agent identity token with user confirmation.

plugins.name: compound-v2-plugin
plugins.description: Compound V2 exit tool on Ethereum mainnet - redeem, repay, claim COMP for legacy V2 positions. Use compound-v3-plugin for active supply/borrow.

plugins.name: compound-v3-plugin
plugins.description: Compound V3 (Comet) lending plugin: supply collateral, borrow/repay the base asset, and claim COMP rewards

plugins.name: curve-plugin
plugins.description: Curve DEX plugin — swap stablecoins, add/remove liquidity, query pools and APY across Ethereum, Arbitrum, Base, Polygon, and BSC.

plugins.name: dolomite-plugin
plugins.description: Dolomite Finance lending/borrowing on Arbitrum - supply assets to earn interest, open isolated borrow positions, repay, withdraw via DolomiteMargin.

plugins.name: eigencloud-plugin
plugins.description: Restake LSTs on EigenLayer to earn AVS operator yield — stake, delegate, and manage your restaking positions

plugins.name: eth-price-demo
plugins.description: Query ETH price via OnchainOS — a simple demo plugin for CI testing

plugins.name: etherfi-plugin
plugins.description: Liquid restaking on Ethereum — deposit ETH to receive eETH, wrap eETH to weETH (ERC-4626), and check positions with APY

plugins.name: euler-v2-plugin
plugins.description: Supply, borrow and earn yield on Euler v2 - a modular lending protocol with isolated-risk vaults (EVK = Euler Vault Kit). Trigger phrases: supply to euler, deposit to euler vault, borrow from euler, repay euler loan, euler health factor, my euler positions, euler vault apy, claim euler rewards, euler markets, evk vaults.

plugins.name: fluid-plugin
plugins.description: Supply collateral and borrow on Fluid Protocol's smart lending vaults on Ethereum and Arbitrum

plugins.name: fourmeme-plugin
plugins.description: Trade Four.meme bonding-curve memecoins on BNB Chain - buy and sell pre-graduate tokens, get live quotes, view holdings. Trigger phrases: buy four meme token, sell four meme, four.meme price, fourmeme quote, fourmeme positions, my fourmeme holdings, list four meme tokens, trending four.meme.

plugins.name: gmx-v2-plugin
plugins.description: Trade perpetuals and spot on GMX V2 — open/close leveraged positions, place limit/stop orders, add/remove GM pool liquidity, query markets and positions

plugins.name: go-sol-price
plugins.description: Query real-time SOL/USDT spot price via the OKX public ticker API (Go demo).

plugins.name: hyperliquid-plugin
plugins.description: Hyperliquid on-chain perpetuals DEX — check positions, get market prices, place and cancel perpetual orders on Hyperliquid L1 (chain_id 999).

plugins.name: kamino-lend-plugin
plugins.description: Supply, borrow, and manage positions on Kamino Lend — the leading Solana lending protocol

plugins.name: kamino-liquidity-plugin
plugins.description: Kamino Liquidity KVault earn vaults on Solana. Deposit tokens to earn yield, withdraw shares, and track positions.

plugins.name: lido-plugin
plugins.description: Stake ETH with Lido liquid staking protocol to receive stETH

plugins.name: lifi-plugin
plugins.description: LI.FI cross-chain bridge & swap aggregator - list chains/tokens, get quotes, execute bridges/swaps, track tx status across Ethereum, Arbitrum, Base, BSC, Polygon, and Optimism.

plugins.name: macro-intelligence
plugins.description: Unified macro intelligence feed — reads 7 sources, classifies events, scores sentiment, generates AI insights, exposes signals via HTTP API

plugins.name: mainstream-spot-order
plugins.description: Multi-chain DEX spot trading system with 6-signal ensemble, auto-research strategy optimization, and per-pair backtesting across SOL, ETH, BTC, BNB, AVAX, DOGE

plugins.name: meme-trench-scanner
plugins.description: Meme Trench Scanner v1.0 — Solana Meme automated trading bot with 11 Launchpad coverage, 7-layer exit system, TraderSoul AI observation

plugins.name: meteora-plugin
plugins.description: Meteora DLMM plugin for Solana — search liquidity pools, get swap quotes, view user positions, execute token swaps, add and remove liquidity

plugins.name: morpho-plugin
plugins.description: Supply, borrow and earn yield on Morpho — a permissionless lending protocol with $5B+ TVL. Trigger phrases: supply to morpho, deposit to morpho vault, borrow from morpho, repay morpho loan, morpho health factor, my morpho positions, morpho interest rates, claim morpho rewards, morpho markets, metamorpho vaults.

plugins.name: okx-buildx-hackathon-agent-track
plugins.description: AI Hackathon participation guide — registration, wallet setup, project building, submission to Moltbook, voting, and scoring. Apr 1-15, 2026. $14,000 USDT in prizes.

plugins.name: one-click-token-launch

plugins.name: orca-plugin

Trigger phrases: stake LP NFT, farm CAKE, harvest CAKE rewards, collect fees, unfarm position, PancakeSwap farming, view positions.

plugins.name: pancakeswap-v2-plugin
plugins.description: Swap tokens and manage liquidity on PancakeSwap V2 (xyk AMM) on BSC, Base, and Arbitrum. Triggers: swap pancakeswap v2, add/remove liquidity pancake, pcs v2 quote, check pancake pair.

plugins.description: Swap tokens and manage liquidity on PancakeSwap V3 on BNB Chain, Base, and Arbitrum

plugins.name: pendle-plugin

plugins.name: plugin-store
plugins.description: The main on-chain DeFi skill. Discover, install, update, and manage plugins — including trading strategies, DeFi integrations, and developer tools — across Claude Code, Cursor, and OpenClaw.

plugins.name: polymarket-plugin

plugins.name: relay-plugin
